bestFor: Budget-conscious beginners validating their first products.
pros: Lower cost than Helium 10 / Jungle Scout
summary: AMZScout covers the research essentials — product database, sales estimates, and a Chrome extension — at a friendlier price point than the big two, and frequently runs lifetime-deal promotions. It's a sensible starting tool for sellers validating their first products who don't yet need a full suite.
name: AMZScout
affiliate: 30% commission via the official affiliate program.
cons: Less depth and fewer advanced tools
Data less battle-tested than market leaders
oneLiner: A lower-cost entry point for product validation.
verdict: Not the most powerful, but an honest budget option — especially if you can catch a lifetime deal. Verify current pricing on AMZScout's site, as it changes frequently.
